texto: The hottest place in Hell is reserved for those who remain neutral in times of great moral conflict.
explicacao: Citação de Martin Luther King sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “The hottest place in Hell is reserved for those who remain neutral in times of great moral conflict.” articula tempo, politics, conflict em registro de tempo, com relevância para contextos como conflict e moral.

texto: If a man hasn't discovered something that he will die for he isn't fit to live.
